homepage.text_excerpt: --> Home | Graham Leadbitter Mp top of page GRAHAM LEADBITTER MP MORAY WEST, NAIRN AND STRATHSPEY Home Email me: graham.leadbitter.mp@parliament.uk Blog Contact Blog Graham Leadbitter MP for Moray West, Nairn and Strathspey About Graham SNP MP for Moray West, Nairn and Strathspey Graham Leadbitter has been the SNP MP for Moray West, Nairn and Strathspey since July 2024 - elected at the general election with a majority of 1,001. Graham is the SNP's Westminster spokesperson for Science, Technology, and Transport. ​ Before being elected to Parliament, Graham was the SNP Councillor for Elgin City South from 2007-2024, serving as the Moray Council leader from 2018-2022. ​ ​ Graham in Parliament With one of the largest constituencies in the country, covering both rural and urban areas, Graham represents a wide range of communities, organisations, and interests in Parliament. In particular Graham has been vocal about the need to support Scotland's world-famous Scotch Whisky sector, with his constituency being home to one-third of Scotland's whisky distilleries. Graham has also held debates in Parliament on the need for a Highland Energy Rebate , and has consistently stood up for the WASPI women directly to the Prime Minister , and in other parliamentary debates . For a full list of Graham's contributions to Parliament visit theyworkforyou.com ​ ​ Contact Graham Address 9 Wards Road Elgin, Moray IV30 1NL Contact graham.leadbitter.mp@parliament.uk Phone: 020 7219 4306 Office opening Hours Monday, Wednesday, Thursday 10am - 4pm 9 Wards Road, Elgin, IV30 1NL graham.leadbitter.mp@parliament.uk 020 7219 4306 USEFUL LINKS ​ ​ Facebook.com/grahamsnp X.com/grahamsnp Register to vote ​ ​ Promoted by Graham Leadbitter MP at 9 Wards Road, Elgin, Moray CONTACT DETAILS Email: graham.leadbitter.mp@parliament.uk Constituency Office: 9 Wards Road, Elgin, IV30 1NL, open Mondays, Wednesdays and Thursdays 10am to 4pm. ​ ​ ​ ​ Graham Leadbitter MP bottom of page
